callGraph.callee:
Label(root, text="Enkripsi Video dengan AI Parameter Predictor",
          font=("Segoe UI", 16, "bold")).pack

Label(root, text="AI akan otomatis mencari kunci terbaik (10 detik)",
          font=("Segoe UI", 10), fg="gray").pack

Entry(ff, textvariable=video_path_var, width=50,
          state='readonly', font=("Segoe UI", 10)).grid
Label(kiri, text="Video Input Asli", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold")).pack
Label(kanan, text="Video Terenkripsi (Raw Biner)", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold")).pack

Radiobutton(mf, text=txt, variable=mode_var,
                    value=val, font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack

Radiobutton(pmf, text=txt, variable=param_mode_var,
                    value=val, font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack

Label(root, text="Dekripsi BIN → Video (.mp4)",
          font=("Segoe UI", 16, "bold")).pack

Label(root, text="Muat kunci dari file AI_Key_Report.txt untuk mendekripsi secara akurat",
          font=("Segoe UI", 10), fg="gray").pack

Entry(ff, textvariable=bin_path_var, width=50,
          state='readonly', font=("Segoe UI", 10)).grid
Label(kiri, text="Video Terenkripsi (Raw Biner)", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold")).pack
Label(kanan, text="Video Hasil Dekripsi (.mp4)", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold")).pack

Radiobutton(mf, text=txt, variable=mode_var,
                    value=val, font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack

Button(param_frame, text="📂 Muat Otomatis Dari AI_Key_Report.txt",
           font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"), bg="#4a90d9", fg="white", activebackground="#357abd",
           command=load_key_from_file, cursor="hand2").grid
Label(cf, text=cap, font=("Segoe UI", 7), fg="#555", justify="center").pack

Button(grp, text=f"Pilih {title}", font=("Segoe UI", 10),
           padx=10, pady=6, bd=1, relief="ridge",
           bg="#e1e7ed", activebackground="#cfd8e3", command=pick).pack

Label(statt, font=("Segoe UI", 15), text="Uji Kualitas Citra Digital",
          bd=1, relief="ridge").pack

Label(statt, font=("Segoe UI", 14), text="Uji Keacakan (Distribusi Korelasi)",
          bd=1, relief="ridge").pack
Label(cf, text=cap, font=("Segoe UI", 7), fg="#555", justify="center").pack

Button(grp, text="Pilih File", font=("Segoe UI", 10),
           padx=10, pady=6, bd=1, relief="ridge",
           bg="#e1e7ed", activebackground="#cfd8e3", command=pick).pack

Label(statt, font=("Segoe UI", 15), text="Uji Statistik Citra Digital",
          bd=1, relief="ridge").pack

Label(root, text="Enkripsi Audio  —  MO-SiPINE",
          font=("Segoe UI", 16, "bold")).pack

Label(root, text="Enkripsi file WAV menggunakan keystream chaos XOR",
          font=("Segoe UI", 10), fg="gray").pack

Entry(ff, textvariable=wav_path_var, width=42,
          state='readonly', font=("Segoe UI", 10)).grid

Radiobutton(mf, text=txt, variable=mode_var,
                    value=val, font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack

Button(pf, text="📂 Muat dari AI_Key_Report.txt",
           font=("Segoe UI", 9), bg="#4a90d9", fg="white",
           command=load_key_from_file, cursor="hand2").grid

Label(root, textvariable=status_var, font=("Segoe UI", 9),
          fg="#00529b", wraplength=560).pack

Label(root, text="Dekripsi Audio  —  MO-SiPINE",
          font=("Segoe UI", 16, "bold")).pack

Label(root, text="Kembalikan file .bin terenkripsi menjadi WAV",
          font=("Segoe UI", 10), fg="gray").pack

Entry(ff, textvariable=bin_path_var, width=42,
          state='readonly', font=("Segoe UI", 10)).grid

Radiobutton(mf, text=txt, variable=mode_var,
                    value=val, font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack

Button(pf, text="📂 Muat Otomatis dari AI_Key_Report.txt",
           font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"), bg="#4a90d9", fg="white",
           command=load_key_from_file, cursor="hand2").grid

Label(root, textvariable=status_var, font=("Segoe UI", 9),
          fg="#00529b", wraplength=560).pack
Label(win_input, text="Uji Kualitas Audio — MO-SiPINE", font=("Segoe UI", 16, "bold")).pack
Label(win_input, text="Pilih file WAV untuk diuji, atau unduh (download) file otomatis dari sesi sebelumnya.", fg="gray").pack
Button(frm, text="⬇️ Download", command=_download, bg="#5bc0de", fg="white").grid
Label(win, text="Hasil Uji Kualitas Audio  —  MO-SiPINE", font=("Segoe UI", 16, "bold")).pack
Label(win, text="Perbandingan: Audio Asli | Audio Noise (Terenkripsi) | Audio Terdekripsi", font=("Segoe UI", 10), fg="gray").pack
Label(frm_tbl, text=h, font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"), bg="#dce4ed", fg="#253555", bd=1, relief="ridge", width=col_widths[ci], pady=3).grid
Label(frm_tbl, text=val, font=("Segoe UI", 10), bg=bg, bd=1, relief="ridge", width=col_widths[ci], pady=2).grid
Button(win, text="Tutup", font=("Segoe UI", 10), bg="#d8e2ec", activebackground="#b8ccdc", padx=20, pady=4, cursor="hand2", command=win.destroy).pack
Button(win_input, text="📊 Proses Uji Kualitas Audio", font=("Segoe UI", 12, "bold"), bg="#4a90d9", fg="white", activebackground="#357abd", padx=20, pady=10, cursor="hand2", command=run_uji).pack

tk.Label(root,
             text="KRIPTOGRAFI\nBERBASIS\nSIP Map",
             font=("Segoe UI", 22, "bold"),
             fg=FG_TITLE, bg=BG, justify="center").pack

tk.Label(frm_status, textvariable=status_var,
             font=("Segoe UI", 8), bg="#d0dcea", fg=FG_SUB,
             anchor="w", wraplength=430).pack

tk.Label(root, text="Video & AI",
             font=("Segoe UI", 12, "bold"),
             fg=FG_SUB, bg=BG).pack

tk.Label(root, text="Uji Kualitas",
             font=("Segoe UI", 12, "bold"),
             fg=FG_SUB, bg=BG).pack

_make_btn(frm_uji,
              "Uji Kualitas\n(Histogram & Korelasi)",
              lambda: uji_histogram_korelasi_video(SESSION, root),
              width=25, pady=10).grid

_make_btn(frm_uji,
              "Uji Distribusi\nKorelasi",
              lambda: uji_distribusi_scatter_video(SESSION, root),
              width=25, pady=10).grid

_make_btn(frm_uji,
              "Uji Statistik\n(Uniform, Entropi, dll)",
              lambda: uji_statistik_video(SESSION, root),
              width=25, pady=10).grid

_make_btn(frm_uji,
              "Uji Kualitas Audio\n(SNR, PSNR, Waveform)",
              lambda: uji_kualitas_audio(session=SESSION, parent=root),
              width=25, pady=10).grid
